title: A Basketball Instructional Motion Replay System with PoseFlow-Integrated Human Tracking
venue: 2025 2nd International Conference on Image Processing, Multimedia Technology and Machine Learning (IPMML)
snippet: Aiming at the problems such as the lack of structuring and lagging feedback in motion evaluation existing in basketball teaching, a human body tracking and motion playback system integrating PoseFlow has been constructed. Based on the challenges such as frequent motion occlusion and difficult pose maintenance in multi-person scenarios, a distributed module system integrating video acquisition, pose estimation, key point tracking, action matching and playback control was designed.
